Author: T.J. Lauerman aka ThatSportsGamer
Description: Displays the full day's MLB schedule across multiple keys — one game per button, updating live every 30 seconds. Designed for Stream Deck XL or any setup with 10+ keys.
Name: Live MLB Scoreboard

Actions.Name: Live MLB Scoreboard
Actions.Tooltip: Shows one game from today's MLB schedule. Place on multiple keys to see the full day at a glance.
